name: Ashwagandha Kesar Prash
description: A potent Ayurvedic Rasayana combining premium Ashwagandha with Grade A+ Kashmiri Saffron. Enhances vitality and balances Vata dosha.

name: Raw Wild Forest Honey
description: Unprocessed, multifloral wild honey sourced from deep forests. A natural Yogavahi that enhances the medicinal properties of herbs.

name: Brahmi Coconut Hair Oil
description: Cold-pressed coconut oil infused with memory-enhancing Brahmi. Traditionally used for cooling the scalp and Pitta balancing.

name: Triphala Wellness Powder
description: The 'three fruits' formula for gentle detoxification and digestive support. Balances all three doshas: Vata, Pitta, and Kapha.

name: Sun-Dried Ginger & Turmeric
description: Potent anti-inflammatory blend of Alleppey Turmeric and Ginger. Sourced using traditional Ayurvedic drying methods.

name: Pure A2 Gir Cow Ghee
description: Hand-churned Vedic Bilona Ghee from A2 Gir cows. Rich in essential nutrients and perfect for Ayurvedic cooking.
